modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to extend equipment checkout reservation.

full_description_text: 
The user is asking if they can extend the checkout period for the hardware they have. They mentioned forgetting the equipment at home and want to know if their reservation can be extended. This is related to their current equipment checkout in Cheqroom.
